response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetics perfectly match the provided reference lyrics for both 'Yoru o Matsu yo' and 'Stellar Stellar'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics for both transcription and translation. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to vocal activation. Aggressive truncation was used for rapid speech segments, and instrumental pauses were respected. Included translations for prominent on-screen song titles.

subtitles.original: もののけはあっちでこっちで踊って
subtitles.english: Mononoke dancing there and here

subtitles.original: 君はハッタリばっかりかまして
subtitles.english: You are bluffing and bluffing
I wait for the night
I wait for the night
If it stays like this,

subtitles.original: どんどんだめになりそう
subtitles.english: I'll be ruined more and more
I wait for the night
I wait for the night

subtitles.original: もっと混沌の海が理想
subtitles.english: A sea of chaos is more ideal
I wait for the night
I'll wait

subtitles.original: 美しい本当よりもひしゃげた
subtitles.english: Rather than the beautiful truth, a twisted version...
I wait for the night
I'll wait for you
I'll wait
Now I'll wait

subtitles.original: いつかきっときっかけはくるのよ
subtitles.english: Someday the trigger will surely come

subtitles.original: 唇でゆっくりゆっくり騙して
subtitles.english: Deceive me slowly, slowly with your lips

subtitles.original: ぼくはポップでチープなふりして
subtitles.english: I'm pretending to be pop and cheap

subtitles.original: 真夜中までの夕暮れを泳いでは
subtitles.english: Swimming in the sunset until midnight

subtitles.original: もののけはうっとりうっそり笑って
subtitles.english: Mononoke is smiling enchantingly, deceptively
While the fuse is burning...
Now...
Tell a lie
Until the night comes

subtitles.original: 夜が明ける千年前からぼくら
subtitles.english: The night dawns, we have been waiting for a thousand years
Wait for the night
Wait for the night

subtitles.original: 君がぜんぜんわからないから
subtitles.english: Because I don't understand you at all
Wait for the night
Wait

subtitles.original: 無理筋なペンチャン待ちでもいいの
subtitles.english: Even if it's an unreasonable penchan waiting
Wait for the night
Wait for the night
I'll wait for you

subtitles.original: そうよもっと切先を研ぐのよ
subtitles.english: Yes, I'll sharpen the blade more
Finally, finally
I'll definitely laugh
I'll wait for you
Finally, finally
It is us who will laugh
[Title: Stellar Stellar]
Just like the shooting star I have become
Stellar Stellar

subtitles.original: きっと君はもう気づいていた
subtitles.english: I'm sure that you've already seen through it all
This script hidden deep down in my heart

subtitles.original: それがこれから話す陳腐なモノローグさ
subtitles.english: That I will now read out, acting the part... a clichéd monologue

subtitles.original: ──ずっと言えない言葉があった
subtitles.english: There are so many things I could not say out loud

subtitles.original: 壊せない壁があったんだ ずっとさ
subtitles.english: So many walls I could never climb beyond... it never ends

subtitles.original: ふっと香り立つ朝の匂いが
subtitles.english: Sensing the scent of morning wafting in the air

subtitles.original: どうしようもなく憎らしくて
subtitles.english: I tried to fight it, filling me with hate

subtitles.original: 部屋の隅で膝を抱えて震えていた
subtitles.english: I sat in a corner and cried into my knees, trembling all the while

subtitles.original: 太陽なんていらないから
subtitles.english: I don't need the sunshine, don't want it in my life
Can dawn please stay away?

subtitles.original: その手を伸ばして 誰かに届くように
subtitles.english: Hold your hand out all the way, reach out and make someone feel

subtitles.original: 僕だって君と同じ 特別なんかじゃないから
subtitles.english: We're very alike, indeed, both you and me... you're not special, neither am I

subtitles.original: そうさ僕は夜を歌うよ Stellar Stellar
subtitles.english: So I sing now through this night so Stellar Stellar
Shining as bright as any eye can take

subtitles.original: 今宵音楽はずっとずっと止まない
subtitles.english: The music will never, ever be stopped tonight

subtitles.original: そうだ僕がずっとなりたかったのは
subtitles.english: So I say, what I wanted to be was never...

subtitles.original: 待ってるシンデレラじゃないさ
subtitles.english: A Cinderella who waits forever
But the prince who goes and gets things done
Just like the shooting star I have become

subtitles.original: なんて、ありふれた話なんだ
subtitles.english: Yeah, right... a run-of-the-mill story, and that's all

subtitles.original: 理想だけ書き連ねていた
subtitles.english: In a diary filled with tales so tall

subtitles.original: ノートの隅に眠るほんのワンシーンだ
subtitles.english: And lying scribbled in the margins, is one of those... this scene so trivial

subtitles.original: ──きっとあの星も泣いてるんだ
subtitles.english: I'm sure the stars in the sky are letting tears fall

subtitles.original: 明日なんて来ないままでいて──
subtitles.english: Can tomorrow never come, can it please stay away?
